instruction: Print the text Hello, World!
Print the number 42.
Add 17 and 25, then print the result.
Subtract 15 from 100 and print the result.
Multiply 9 by 8 and print the answer.
Divide 144 by 12 and print the result.
Print the remainder when 17 is divided by 5.
Raise 2 to the power of 10 and print it.
Store 15 in a variable named x and print it.
Create variables a = 5 and b = 7, then print their sum.
Print every number from 1 through 5.
Print every even number from 2 through 10.
Print the numbers from 5 down to 1.
Print the word Hi three times.
Print the numbers 10, 20, and 30, each on a new line.
Create a list containing 1, 2, 3, and print the first element.
Create a list containing 5, 10, and 15, then print the last element.
Create a variable score equal to 95. If it is greater than 90, print Excellent.
Create a variable temperature equal to 20. If it is below 32 print Cold, otherwise print Warm.
Create a variable x equal to 3. If x equals 5 print Yes, otherwise print No.
